message:
🐛 Show skeleton for all cards when agent offline and demo mode OFF (#480)

When demo mode is OFF and the KC agent is disconnected, all live cards
now show skeleton animation instead of stale/cached demo data.

This unified fix in CardWrapper prevents showing misleading cached
demo cluster data (e.g., alibaba-ack-shanghai, gke-staging) when the
user expects live data from their real clusters.

Key changes:
- Import useLocalAgent to detect agent connection status
- Add forceSkeletonForOffline flag for live cards (those using useCardLoadingState)
- Cards that only support demo data are not affected
- Refresh animation shows while waiting for agent to connect

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
